title: Photos: College of Nursing seniors make waves to celebrate graduation
summary_en: Nearly 100 College of Nursing seniors took part in the decades-old tradition on May 4.
title_cn: 《伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校护理学院应届毕业生参与跳泳池传统活动庆祝毕业》

title: Professor named to American Academy of Arts and Sciences
summary_en: Luis Alberto Urrea is the eighth UIC faculty member to join the prestigious honorary society.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校教授路易斯·阿尔韦托·乌雷亚入选2026年美国艺术与科学院院士

title: UIC historian Jane Rhodes elected to the American Antiquarian Society
summary_en: Rhodes was recognized for her outstanding contributions to academic and public life.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校历史学家简·罗兹当选美国古文物协会会员

title: Neuropsychiatric Institute facade restoration project nears completion
summary_en: Restoration work at the historic site is expected to be completed in July.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校神经精神病学研究所外立面修复工程即将完工

title: UIC celebrates 2026 spring commencement May 6-9
summary_en: Chicago’s largest public university to award about 6,600 degrees.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学芝加哥分校2026年春季毕业典礼将于5月6日至9日举办

title: UI Health earns “A” for hospital safety from The Leapfrog Group
summary_en: The grade recognizes UI Health for commitment to patient safety.
title_cn: 伊利诺伊大学医疗系统获跳蛙集团医院安全评级A级
